message:
chore(beads): add integration tasks for sbh, dsr, casr, ru and update dependencies

Add 25 new issues tracking ACFS integration work for four tools:
- storage_ballast_helper (sbh): install, checksums, manifest, onboarding, webapp, E2E, update
- doodlestein_self_releaser (dsr): install, checksums, manifest, onboarding, webapp, E2E, update
- claude_agent_session_recovery (casr): install, checksums, manifest, onboarding, webapp, E2E, update
- repo_updater (ru): E2E test, webapp verification, update.sh verification, --easy-mode flag bug fix

Update dependencies on 10 existing pt/zsh/webapp/AGENTS.md issues to reflect
the expanded tool integration scope (dependencies field changes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
